meta.title: B2B Website Design & Brand Agency | Eye On Idea
meta.description: We help SMB B2B companies build a credible digital presence — professional websites, visual identity, and ongoing support. Denmark-based, Europe-ready.

hero.headline: Your business deserves a brand presence
hero.subheadline: We help SMB B2B companies build a credible digital foundation — anchored by a professional website and supported by visual identity, content, and ongoing management.

about.title: A Partner, Not Just a Supplier
about.description: Eye On Idea is a Danish digital consultancy that helps companies build a clear and reliable online presence. We work with businesses that want more than a basic website. You gain structure, clarity, and a solution that supports long-term growth.

clarity.title: Clarity First
clarity.description: We build what you need and explain it in a way that makes sense.

partnership.title: Long-Term Collaboration
partnership.description: We support you before, during, and after launch.

quality.title: Built to Last
quality.description: We choose reliable tools and build solutions designed for durability.

services.title: Find Your Level of Digital Presence
services.subtitle: Three package tiers designed around where your business is right now — and where it needs to go.

websites.title: Websites
websites.need: You need a professional website that builds trust from the first visit.
websites.skill: A professionally built website scoped to where your company is right now — structured, fast, and designed to grow.

identity.title: Identity
identity.need: You need a visual identity that is clear, consistent, and easy to recognize.
identity.skill: A CMS-enabled platform with structured content, SEO readiness, and the flexibility to evolve as you do.

content.title: Content
content.need: You need clear, ongoing content that explains value and keeps your brand active.
content.skill: A long-term working relationship where Eye On Idea acts as your ongoing digital and brand management partner.

seo.title: SEO & Social Media
seo.orbNote: Be found by the clients who matter.
seo.need: Great work goes unseen without a strategy for search and social discovery.
seo.skill: We optimise your visibility on search engines and build your presence where your clients are.

email.title: Professional Email
email.need: Free-tier email addresses signal a lack of seriousness to B2B clients.
email.skill: We set up branded, secure business email that reinforces your professional identity.

domain.title: Domain Management
domain.orbNote: Own and protect your digital address.
domain.need: Your domain is your digital address — it needs to be owned, protected, and properly configured.
domain.skill: We register, secure, and manage your domain so you never lose control of your brand online.

qa.title: Quality Assurance
qa.orbNote: Catch issues before your clients do.
qa.need: Broken flows, slow pages, and accessibility failures silently cost you clients.
qa.skill: We audit and test digital products end-to-end — identifying issues before your users do.

discover.title: Discover
discover.description: We start by understanding your business, goals, and what success looks like.

design.title: Design
design.description: We create a solution tailored to your needs - no templates, no one-size-fits-all.

develop.title: Develop
develop.description: We build with quality, accessibility, and long-term maintainability in mind.

support.title: Support
support.description: We're here after launch - for updates, improvements, and ongoing partnership.

cta.title: Let's figure out the right scope together
cta.description: You don't need a finished brief to start. Tell us where you are — we'll help work out what you actually need.

audience.title: Eye On Idea is built for SMB B2B companies that need a clearer, more credible digital presence.
audience.subtitle: You are likely a good fit if your business is in one of these situations.

situations.heading: You have outgrown your current digital presence
situations.body: Owner-led or lean B2B companies that have relied on a placeholder site, a DIY setup, or no real brand system. You need your first serious foundation — something that looks deliberate, earns trust, and reflects the quality of your actual work.
situations.imageAlt: Editorial studio scene showing a business transitioning from rough website sketches to a polished screen mockup

situations.heading: Your website or brand no longer reflects who you are
situations.body: Your business has grown and improved, but your online presence hasn't kept pace. What you have online makes you look less credible than you really are — and you know it costs you opportunities.
situations.imageAlt: Brand print set contrasted with a modern cohesive identity system, illustrating a mismatch between company quality and current presentation

situations.heading: You need more than a one-off build
situations.body: Growing companies that want structure, clearer content, and a long-term digital partner. You are not looking for a freelancer to hand off to — you want someone who stays involved and helps your digital presence improve over time.
situations.imageAlt: Modular project boards and timeline cards arranged as an ongoing system, representing a long-term digital partnership

packages.title: Find Your Starting Point
packages.subtitle: Every business is different. These three packages are where we start — each one scoped and tailored to where you are right now.

items.name: Get Started
items.tagline: Your website and logo, done right from day one.
items.description: For new businesses and anyone building their first serious digital presence. You get a professionally designed website and logo — everything you need to show up, look credible, and start winning clients.

items.name: Look the Part
items.tagline: A brand that reflects the quality of your work.
items.description: For businesses that already exist but look inconsistent or dated. We rebuild your visual identity — logo, colours, typography, and the materials to put it all to use.

items.name: Stay Ahead
items.tagline: Your brand, kept current. Every month.
items.description: For businesses that want ongoing support — not just a one-off project. We stay involved, create content, and make sure everything you have continues to work as well as the day it launched.

cases.title: Real Work. Measurable Results.
cases.subtitle: A selection of companies Eye On Idea has helped build a more credible, structured digital presence.

featured.title: Tegetec
featured.outcome: Industrial equipment provider rebuilt with a clean, SEO-structured presence that communicates credibility to professional buyers.

featured.title: Herqulez
featured.outcome: Modular fitness platform built from the ground up — full identity, architecture, and content infrastructure.
